task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the ephemeris text file to obtain the waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'apophis_ephemeris.txt' with RA and Dec coordinates.

task_completion.description: Agent inputs the step-and-stare waypoints into the telescope control software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Telescope control GUI (e.g., KStars/Ekos) showing the mount pointing to or slewing towards the specific RA/Dec coordinates from the ephemeris (e.g., RA 9.75, Dec 20.25).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the camera for 10-second LIGHT exposures using the Clear/Luminance filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera capture GUI (e.g., Ekos Capture module) showing exposure time set to 10 seconds, frame type set to 'LIGHT', and filter set to Slot 1, 'Clear', 'Lum', or 'Luminance'.

task_completion.description: Agent captures the FITS images and saves them to the specified tracking directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal window showing multiple newly captured .fits files located in the '/home/ga/Images/neo_tracking/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent writes a Python script to normalize the FITS arrays and generate an animated GIF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor or terminal showing a Python script that includes logic for reading FITS files, normalizing data (using min and 99th percentile to scale to 255), and saving a GIF with a 500ms duration and infinite loop.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully generates the final animated GIF in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or image viewer showing the file 'neo_animation.gif' present in '/home/ga/Images/neo_tracking/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual telescope/camera control GUI to capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with astronomy software (like KStars/Ekos) to capture the FITS files, rather than terminal commands mocking or downloading pre-existing FITS files.

integrity.description: Agent executed the Python script to generate the GIF rather than renaming an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the Python script (e.g., 'python3 make_gif.py') and no commands that simply copy or rename a pre-existing GIF file.

integrity.description: Agent worked within the correct requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The directory '/home/ga/Images/neo_tracking/' should be visible in the file manager or terminal prompts during the capture and script execution phases.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: 99942 Apophis. Expected Waypoints (RA, Dec): (9.75, 20.25), (9.7833, 19.8333), (9.8167, 19.4167), (9.85, 19.0), (9.8833, 18.5833) with a tolerance of 0.15 degrees. Filter: Slot 1 (Luminance/Clear). Exposure: 10 seconds. Output directory: /home/ga/Images/neo_tracking. GIF path: /home/ga/Images/neo_tracking/neo_animation.gif. GIF settings: 500ms frame duration, infinite loop. Normalization logic: min to 0, 99th percentile to 255.
